name: io.github.Abhigyan-Shekhar/Waggle-mcp
description: Persistent graph-backed conversational memory for AI agents.

environmentVariables.name: WAGGLE_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport mode for the MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: WAGGLE_BACKEND
environmentVariables.description: Backend database type: sqlite for local use or neo4j for service deployments.

environmentVariables.name: WAGGLE_DB_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to the SQLite memory database when WAGGLE_BACKEND is sqlite.

environmentVariables.name: WAGGLE_DEFAULT_TENANT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Default tenant ID for local or shared memory isolation.

environmentVariables.name: WAGGLE_API_KEY_ENVIRONMENT
environmentVariables.description: Generated API key prefix environment: test/local for non-production or live for production.

environmentVariables.name: WAGGLE_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Sentence-transformers model used for local embeddings.
